arts.ttl: Presenter Reacts to Terrible News He Heard Out of Newcastle in Last 48 Hours
arts.sum: Andy Goldstein believes Jose Mourinho would be a terrible appointment for Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Nuno Espirito Santo makes Newcastle United squad point as Nottingham Forest seek to push on
arts.sum: Despite these challenges, Nuno feels confident in his team selection, suggesting that the players are making his job easier at the moment. Nuno Espirito Santo is keeping his feet firmly on the ground as Nottingham Forest prepare to face Newcastle United at the City Ground.

arts.ttl: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe admits he did not want to sell Elliot Anderson
arts.sum: The Newcastle United academy graduate joing Nottingham Forest in the summer

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest vs Newcastle predictions: Tight City Ground clash on the cards
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest have made a superb start to the Premier League season, but Ian Wilkerson expects them to be tested to the full by Newcastle at the City Ground on Sunday.

arts.ttl: Injured Nottingham Forest midfield duo ruled out of Newcastle United test but Ward-Prowse returns
arts.sum: When asked about Danilo and Sangare last week, Nuno said: “They are getting better day by day. But the Forest chief will definitely be without Danilo and Ibrahima Sangare.

arts.ttl: Team News: Nottingham Forest vs. Newcastle United injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Sunday's Premier League clash between Nottingham Forest and Newcastle United.

arts.ttl: Newcastle's forced £35 million transfer labelled a shambles as Premier League criticised
arts.sum: Elliot Anderson's journey to Nottingham Forest has been labelled a'shambles' after Newcastle United were forced to sell the midfielder to avoid a points deduction as a consequence of the profit and sustainability rules. Speaking on The View from the Opposition via The Everything is Black and White Podcast, Matt Davies of Forest Focus conceded that the current financial rules are 'not good for football.'

arts.ttl: Newcastle United icon Alan Shearer outlines I'm A Celebrity stance after Ian Wright talks
arts.sum: Speaking to Betfair, he said: "I'm a Celeb is due to start later this month and other than Wrighty, who we know has been in the jungle - and he's told me all about it and how he won't be going back in - there's only Micah Richards of my punditry colleagues I could see in there." Newcastle United legend Alan Shearer has dismissed any possibility of him participating in I'm a Celebrity...

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Nottingham Forest owner Evangelos Marinakis tipped to purchase three more clubs after Edu
Newcastle United hit out at PSR quirk that banked millions as alternative solution suggested
arts.sum: Eddie Howe 'doesn't understand' the rationale behind Premier League clubs being 'incentivised' to sell academy graduates as Newcastle United prepare to face Elliot Anderson once again. The sales of Anderson and Minteh to Nottingham Forest and Brighton ultimately spared Newcastle the doomsday scenario of a possible points deduction, but CEO Darren Eales said it was 'perverse' that clubs were effectively rewarded with pure profit for selling such youngsters.
